hook: Comfort often creates more attraction than trying to manufacture edge too early.
body: When the setting reduces unnecessary stress, both people have more bandwidth for humor, curiosity, and real chemistry.

hook: Some men think a high-stimulation venue will create a spark that the interaction itself has not yet earned.
body: Support chemistry with the environment, but do not ask the environment to fake it for you.

body: A calm but alive bar can do more for attraction than a hyper-loud place that makes every exchange feel like work.
